title: EvidenceBundle
description: Bharat Kavach Phase 1 — auditable forensic evidence bundle schema

bundle_id.description: UUID v4 uniquely identifying this evidence bundle

analyzed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when analysis was performed

sha256_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of canonical bundle payload (all fields except sha256_hash itself)

model_registry.description: Maps each component name to the model version/ID used during analysis

chain_of_custody.description: Ordered list of processing steps, one entry per invoked component

component.description: Name of the AI component that performed this step

artifact_type.description: Type of artifact processed in this step

action.description: Human-readable description of the action taken (or serialisation_error message)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this step occurred

component_verdicts.description: Verdict objects for all four AI components; always contains exactly four keys

ComponentVerdict.description: Output verdict from a single AI component

verdict.description: Human-readable verdict string; 'not_applicable' when the component was not invoked

confidence.description: Model confidence score in [0.0, 1.0]; null when component was not invoked

details.description: Component-specific structured output; null when component was not invoked
